text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, March 16. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Bedtime can be a challenge. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan's team played a match and won 3-2! Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: We got invited to a neighbor's house. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Yum, that sounds delicious! Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading a new book before bed. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that doing some cleaning around the house. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's a big step. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning a street block party soon. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've noted the plans. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Healthy choices are great. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
